expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run states it cannot demonstrate coverage due to missing/ inaccessible evidence: "Because the blind evidence bundle contents are not available here, no customer-issue-backed behaviors can be extracted to demonstrate phase4a planning coverage for: - OK confirmation - Cancel confirmation - Pending selection state - Dismissal outcomes" and under contract check: "Requirement: Case focus explicitly covered - Not demonstrable from the provided evidence."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly titled and scoped to phase4a: "# Phase 4a — Confirmation & dismissal outcomes coverage" and includes "Primary phase under test: phase4a" plus a section "Phase 4a contract check" focused on confirmation/dismissal outcomes.
